Defines a function to get the launch button ID using a system call.

# Purpose
This code defines a function [`app_launch_button`](<#app_launch_button>) that returns a `ButtonId`. The function calls `sys_process_get_launch_button` from the `syscall` library to obtain the identifier of the button used to launch an application. The file includes the header `app_launch_button.h`, which likely contains the declaration of the [`app_launch_button`](<#app_launch_button>) function and possibly the `ButtonId` type definition. This code is part of a system that manages application launch processes, specifically handling the retrieval of the launch button identifier.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `app_launch_button.h`
- `syscall/syscall.h`


# Functions

---
### app\_launch\_button<!-- {{#callable:app_launch_button}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../src/fw/applib/app_launch_button.c#L21>)

Retrieves the identifier of the launch button from the system process.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Calls the `sys_process_get_launch_button` function to obtain the launch button identifier.
    - Returns the result from `sys_process_get_launch_button`.
- **Output**: Returns a `ButtonId` which is the identifier of the launch button.
